TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_likecu, title = likecu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/likecu} }

S.FORM: u sulit nu hulam:Á™Ą,Á∑ä tinaku a kamu likecu Á™Ą,Á∑ä kizemu tu kaku sa, likecu tu ku zikuc aku. .
S.PHON: u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam:*,* tinaku a kamu r~…ĺik…ô ¶u *,* kiz…ômu tu kaku sa, r~…ĺik…ô ¶u tu ku ziku ¶ aku. .
